landing_site.name: Landing Site
landing_site.description: A scorched clearing where the shuttle touched down. Supply crates are scattered around the wreckage. The ground is flat and firm — a natural starting point.

forest_edge.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge.description: Where grassland yields to tall oaks and birches. Berry bushes grow along the treeline. A well-worn animal trail leads deeper into the woods.

dense_forest.name: Dense Forest
dense_forest.description: Ancient trees form a thick canopy overhead. Mushrooms cluster at the base of massive trunks. The air is cool and damp. Strange sounds echo from deeper within.

river_bank.name: River Bank
river_bank.description: A gentle river curves through mossy banks. Smooth stones line the shore. Reeds sway in the current. Fish dart beneath the surface.

open_meadow.name: Open Meadow
open_meadow.description: Rolling fields of tall grass and wildflowers stretch to the horizon. The soil here is dark and fertile. Wind ripples through the grass in waves.

rocky_highlands.name: Rocky Highlands
rocky_highlands.description: Windswept ridges of exposed stone rise above the treeline. Ore veins glint in the cliff faces. From the lookout point, the entire island is visible.

stone_quarry.name: Stone Quarry
stone_quarry.description: A natural depression where layers of sandstone and limestone are exposed. Loose rocks litter the ground. Good building material everywhere.

beach.name: Beach
beach.description: Warm sand meets turquoise shallows. Driftwood collects along the tideline. Shells and small crabs dot the shore. The ocean stretches endlessly.

lake_shore.name: Lake Shore
lake_shore.description: A tranquil freshwater lake fed by the river. Lily pads float on the surface. Clay deposits line the banks. Fish leap at dawn and dusk.
